blended.narrative: Hoodoo is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,994 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.8" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Wednesday: 5" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 5".
